overall.description: A first-person exploration of a gothic graveyard at night in a video game. The player walks through the cemetery with stone mausoleums, encounters a ghostly figure, and enters a tomb leading to a dark tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery entrance with stone archway

agents.ego_description: standing at the graveyard entrance looking toward the illuminated path leading uphill

entered.detail: dark stone arch structure marking the cemetery entrance
wet cobblestone path reflecting the lantern light
stone stairs leading up the hillside into the cemetery
dark mountain silhouette against the cloudy night sky
warm glowing lantern mounted on a stone wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the entrance to a historic cemetery at night. A cobblestone path leads toward stone stairs climbing a hillside, flanked by a stone archway and illuminated by warm lantern light. Mountains are visible in the distance under a cloudy night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking around the exterior of a large stone mausoleum examining its gothic architecture

entered.detail: large stone mausoleum with pointed gothic arch entrance and carved details
cluster of purple flowers growing beside the mausoleum
smaller stone tomb structure in the background
stone bench placed near the mausoleum entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the grassy cemetery grounds to a large gothic mausoleum with ornate stone carvings and a pointed arch entrance. Purple flowers grow beside the structure as the camera circles around it, revealing stone benches and smaller tombs in the vicinity.

scene_state.functional_zone: open graveyard with scattered tombs and distant village house

events.description: ghostly white figure appears near the tree and begins moving across the graveyard

agents.ego_description: approaching a domed mausoleum and observing a ghostly white figure moving through the graveyard

notable_agents.action: ghostly white figure walking from right to left across the graveyard path

entered.detail: stone mausoleum with domed roof and sealed entrance
translucent white humanoid figure moving through the cemetery
tall deciduous tree with full foliage
distant house with lit windows on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open graveyard, the camera approaches a domed mausoleum. A ghostly white figure emerges from behind a large tree and walks across the scene from right to left. In the background, a village house with lit windows sits on the rocky hillside under the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to a gated mausoleum entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward an iron-gated mausoleum and stopping briefly before the entrance

entered.detail: stone mausoleum with ornate iron gate at the entrance
wrought iron gate with decorative scrollwork sealing the tomb entrance
stone bench positioned near the mausoleum steps

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a dirt path toward a mausoleum sealed with an ornate iron gate. As the camera approaches, the gate and stone architecture become more prominent, while the previous mausoleum and ghostly figure disappear from view behind. A stone bench sits to the right of the entrance approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone tunnel leading to tomb interior

events.description: passing through the iron gate into the mausoleum interior, transitioning from outdoor to indoor
ambient light decreases significantly as moving deeper into the stone tunnel

agents.ego_description: moving from the outdoor graveyard into the dark stone tunnel interior of the tomb

entered.detail: narrow stone corridor with rough hewn walls and ceiling
warm light source visible at the far end of the dark tunnel
rough stone walls with roots and cracks

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the iron gate into the mausoleum, transitioning from the outdoor cemetery to a narrow stone tunnel. The space becomes enclosed and dark, with only a distant warm light visible at the end of the corridor. Rough stone walls and a rocky ceiling surround the path as the camera moves deeper into the tomb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a moonlit gothic cemetery that gradually transitions from an open hillside graveyard into the claustrophobic depths of a stone tomb. It begins at a cobblestone entrance under a cloudy night sky, moving past warm lanterns and stone stairs toward the grassy grounds. As the camera glides forward, it circles an ornate gothic mausoleum flanked by purple flowers before shifting toward a domed structure where a ghostly white figure drifts across the path against a backdrop of a distant village house. The scene then follows a dirt path toward a sealed iron gate, leaving the open graveyard behind as the architecture looms closer. Finally, the camera passes through the gate and enters a narrow stone tunnel, where the open night air is replaced by rough walls and a dark, enclosed corridor leading toward a distant light.
